rationale: Educ. Code §130.010 governs junior college district purchasing contracts and is unrelated to the residence homestead exemption in Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: The provisions of Subchapter B, Chapter 44, relating to the purchase of goods and services under contract by a school district apply to the purchase of goods and services under contract by a junior college district.
_note: Rule text concerns procurement rules for junior college districts; no relationship to homestead exemption amounts.
